package.name: Chem
package.description: Cheminformatics support: import, rendering, sketching, calculation of properties, predictive models, augmentations, multiple analyses.

features.name: Substructure Search
features.description: Enables users to search a molecular column for rows matching a drawn or typed substructure query, with matched-fragment highlighting and an integrated filter panel.

members.name: Substructure Filter
members.description: RDKit-based substructure filter

members.name: Use as filter
members.description: Adds this structure as a substructure filter

features.name: Similarity Search
features.description: Finds molecules similar to a query structure by fingerprint-based Tanimoto scoring, returning a ranked table or scatter view and supporting sort-by-similarity.

members.name: Sort by similarity
members.description: Sorts a molecular column by similarity

members.name: Similarity Matrix
members.description: Computes a full pairwise Tanimoto similarity matrix for the molecules, labeled by the symbol column.

members.name: Demo Similarity Search
members.description: Searching for most similar or diverse molecules in dataset

members.name: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints
members.description: Similarity Maps Using Fingerprints, RDKit based

features.name: Diversity Search
features.description: Selects a maximally diverse subset of molecules using fingerprint-based distance metrics, useful for compound library design and representative-set selection.

features.name: Molecular Fingerprints
features.description: Computes and caches Morgan (circular) fingerprints for molecular columns, providing the common numeric representation for similarity, diversity, and chemical-space analyses.

members.name: AddMorganFPCache
members.description: Adds a column with Morgan fingerprints

features.name: Chemical Space
features.description: Projects a molecular dataset into a 2D scatter plot via dimensionality reduction (UMAP, t-SNE) on fingerprints, revealing structural neighborhoods and clusters.

members.name: Chem Space
members.description: Maps the dataset to 2D plot based on similarity

members.name: Demo Chemical Space
members.description: Maps the dataset to 2D plot based on similarity

members.name: Chemical Space Using tSNE
members.description: Chemical space using t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding

members.name: Chemical Space Using UMAP
members.description: Chemical space using Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection

features.name: Molecular Clustering
features.description: Clusters molecules into groups using fingerprint-based algorithms (BitBIRCH, Butina) and annotates each cluster with its maximum common substructure.

members.name: BitBIRCH Clustering
members.description: O(N) incremental clustering of molecules based on binary fingerprint similarity

members.name: Cluster MCS
members.description: Calculates most common substructures for each cluster

members.name: clusterMCS
members.description: Calculates most common substructures for each cluster

members.name: Butina Molecules Clustering
members.description: Implementation of the clustering algorithm published in: Butina JCICS 39 747-750 (1999)

features.name: Scaffold Tree
features.description: Generates a hierarchical Murcko-scaffold tree from a molecular dataset, enabling navigation and filtering of compounds by structural core.

members.name: addScaffoldTree
members.description: Generates a hierarchical tree based on the scaffolds presented in dataset

members.name: Scaffold Tree Filter
members.description: Scaffold Tree filter

members.name: Demo Scaffold Tree
members.description: Running scaffold analysis with hierarchical tree

members.name: GenerateScaffoldTree
members.description: generation scaffold tree from dataset

members.name: Murcko Scaffolds
members.description: Generation of Murcko scaffolds from a molecule

features.name: R-Groups Analysis
features.description: Decomposes a set of molecules around a common core scaffold into R-group substituent columns, enabling SAR analysis across the substituent space.

members.name: Demo R Group Analysis
members.description: R Group Analysis including R-group decomposition and  visual analysis of the obtained R-groups

features.name: Activity Cliffs
features.description: Identifies pairs of structurally similar molecules with large differences in a biological activity value and visualises them in a chemical-space scatter plot with cliff edges.

members.name: Activity Cliffs
members.description: Detects pairs of molecules with similar structure and significant difference in any given property

members.name: Demo Activity Cliffs
members.description: Searching similar structures with significant activity difference

features.name: Matched Molecular Pairs
features.description: Detects matched molecular pairs (MMP) — molecules differing by a single structural transformation — and quantifies the effect of each transformation on measured properties.

members.name: Demo Matched Molecular Pairs
members.description: Detect matched molecule pairs calculate the difference in activity values between them

features.name: Multi-Parameter Optimization (MPO)
features.description: Calculates a composite desirability score for molecules using user-defined profiles that weight and combine multiple physicochemical properties, with a dedicated profile-management app.

members.name: mpo
members.description: Calculates the MPO score for the column of molecules

features.name: Chemical Descriptors
features.description: Computes a broad library of RDKit molecular descriptors (topological, geometric, electronic) and appends them as new columns, with an interactive descriptor-picker panel.

features.name: Chemical Properties
features.description: Calculates key physicochemical properties (MW, logP, logS, HBA, HBD, PSA, pKa, pI, logD, rotatable bonds) and elemental composition as new columns.

members.name: Chemical Properties
members.description: Calculates chemical properties and adds them as columns to the input table. properties include Molecular Weight (MW), Hydrogen Bond Acceptors (HBA), Hydrogen…

members.name: Chemistry | Properties
members.description: Basic molecule properties

members.name: getChemPropertyFunction
members.description: Return chem property function

members.name: Biochemical Properties
members.description: Dynamically discovers and executes tagged biochemical calculators

members.name: Calculate logD
members.description: Calculates the distribution coefficient (logD) at a specified pH using pKa and logP.

members.name: Calculate logP
members.description: Calculates the octanol-water partition coefficient (logP) using RDKit's Crippen method.

members.name: Calculate logS
members.description: Predicts aqueous solubility (logS) using the AqSolPred consensus model. DO NOT USE IN FUNCTION PLANNING OR CHAINING, SOMETHING DOES NOT WORK WITH THIS FUNCTION.

members.name: Calculate pI
members.description: Calculates Isoelectric Point (pI) using various pKa datasets.

members.name: Calculate pKa
members.description: Calculates acidic and basic pKa values, noting non-ionizable molecules.

members.name: Chemistry | Gasteiger Partial Charges
members.description: RDKit-based script.

features.name: Structural Alerts & Catalog Filters
features.description: Screens molecules against PAINS, toxicophore, and other structural-alert catalogs, flagging problematic fragments that may cause assay interference.

members.name: Structural Alerts
members.description: Highlights the fragments that could lead to potential chemical hazards

members.name: Biology | Structural Alerts
members.description: Screening drug candidates against structural alerts i.e. fragments associated to a toxicological response

members.name: Filter by Catalogs
members.description: Finds undesireable molecules based on various criteria

features.name: Drug Likeness & Toxicity
features.description: Evaluates drug-likeness via fragment-contribution scoring (OCL) and predicts toxicity risks (mutagenicity, carcinogenicity, etc.) for candidate molecules.

members.name: Biology | Drug Likeness
members.description: Drug Likeness score, with explanations on molecule fragments contributing to the score. OCL.

members.name: Biology | Toxicity
members.description: Toxicity prediction. Calculated by openchemlib

features.name: Pharmacophore Features
features.description: Detects and highlights hydrogen-bond donors, acceptors, hydrophobic regions, and other pharmacophoric features on 2D molecular structures.

members.name: Pharmacophore Features
members.description: Detects pharmacophore features (donors, acceptors, hydrophobic, etc.)

members.name: Biology | Pharmacophore Features
members.description: Detects and highlights pharmacophore features (donors, acceptors, hydrophobic, aromatic, positive, negative)

members.name: USRCAT
members.description: USRCAT - real-time ultrafast shape recognition with pharmacophoric constraints

features.name: Molecular Rendering
features.description: Renders 2D molecular structures in grid cells and widgets using RDKit or OpenChemLib, with optional substructure highlighting and coordinate recalculation.

members.name: Recalculate Coordinates
members.description: Recalculates 2D coordinates for molecules in the column using RDKit CoordGen or Open Chem Lib

members.name: beautifyMols
members.description: Beautifies the list of molecules and returns the list of beautified molecules

members.name: Structure | 2D Structure
members.description: 2D molecule representation

members.name: Copy as IMAGE
members.description: Copies structure as Image

features.name: 3D Structure
features.description: Generates 3D conformers from SMILES/Molfile and displays interactive 3D molecular structures in an info panel.

members.name: Structure | 3D Structure
members.description: 3D molecule representation

members.name: Generate Conformers
members.description: Generates multiple conformers for a molecule using RDKit

features.name: Notation Conversion
features.description: Converts molecular structures between SMILES, SMARTS, InChI, Molfile V2000/V3000, and canonical SMILES formats, including clipboard copy in any format.

members.name: convertMolNotation
members.description: RDKit-based conversion for SMILES, SMARTS, InChi, Molfile V2000 and Molfile V3000

members.name: Copy as...
members.description: Copies structure in different formats

members.name: Copy as SMILES
members.description: Copies structure as smiles

members.name: Copy as MOLFILE V2000
members.description: Copies structure as molfile V2000

members.name: Copy as MOLFILE V3000
members.description: Copies structure as molfile V3000

members.name: Copy as SMARTS
members.description: Copies structure as smarts

members.name: convertToV3KViaOCL
members.description: Converts the list of molecules to V3K format using OCL

features.name: SDF/MOL File Import & Export
features.description: Registers file handlers for SDF, MOL, MOL2, and SMILES formats enabling transparent open-in-Datagrok, plus SDF export of the current table.

members.name: importSdf
members.description: Opens SDF file

members.name: importSmi
members.description: Opens smi file

members.name: importMol2
members.description: Opens smi file

members.name: importMol
members.description: Opens MOL file

members.name: saveAsSdf
members.description: As SDF...

features.name: Molecule Sketcher
features.description: Provides in-grid molecule editing via an embedded molecular sketcher (OpenChemLib, Ketcher, Marvin, or ChemDraw), used for cell editing and as the input widget for search functions.

members.name: editMoleculeCell
members.description: Molecule

features.name: Reaction Enumeration
features.description: Applies SMARTS reaction templates to building blocks to enumerate product libraries, supporting single-component transformations and two-component reactions.

members.name: Reaction Enumerator
members.description: Forward-reaction library enumeration over building blocks and SMARTS templates.

members.name: transformationReactions
members.description: Runs reaction based on the reaction SMARTS and list of reactants

members.name: twoComponentReaction
members.description: Runs a reaction between molecules from two columns

members.name: Two Component Reaction
members.description: Two component reaction

members.name: Mutate
members.description: Generates the new dataset based on the given structure. Generated table has a column named 'mutations' with mutated structures.

features.name: Mixture Support
features.description: Handles mixture-encoded SMILES (multi-component notation) with a dedicated cell renderer, tree-visualization panel, and conversion to flat SMILES.

features.name: ChemProp Machine Learning
features.description: Trains message-passing neural network (D-MPNN) models on molecular property data using ChemProp and applies them to predict properties for new molecules.

members.name: trainChemprop
members.description: To be added

features.name: Synthon Search
features.description: Searches virtual combinatorial libraries (synthon spaces) by substructure or fingerprint similarity using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch, returning enumerated products.

members.name: Databases | Synthon Search | Substructure Search
members.description: Substructure search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

members.name: Databases | Synthon Search | Similarity Search
members.description: Fingerprint similarity search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

members.name: Search Synthons
members.description: Search in synthon chemical space and return products with synthon structures

members.name: Get Synthon Spaces
members.description: Get all available synthon spaces from Chem package files

members.name: SynthonSearch
members.description: Search in synthon chemical space using RDKit SynthonSpaceSearch

features.name: Identifier Mapping
features.description: Maps between molecular identifier formats (SMILES, InChI, InChIKey, chemical names) via lookup or computation, including name-to-SMILES resolution.

features.name: Molecule Validation & Curation
features.description: Validates, standardizes, and curates molecular structures by detecting invalid entries, removing salts and waters, deprotecting groups, and deduplicating a dataset.

members.name: removeWaterAndSalts
members.description: Removes water and salts from the list of molecules

members.name: Deprotect
members.description: Removes drawn protecting groups / fragments from molecules

members.name: Curate
members.description: Standardizes the dataset
